A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true, and R is the correct explanation of A
solution:
H2O

θ=104.5°

solution: Antihistamines are used to relieve or prevent the symptoms of hay fever and other types of allergy. q:
2MnO4-+bC2O42-+cH+→xMn2++yCO2+zH2O
If the above equation is balanced with integer coefficients, the value of c is _______ . (Round off to the Nearest Integer).
question:
2MnO4-+bC2O42-+cH+→xMn2++yCO2+zH2O
If the above equation is balanced with integer coefficients, the value of c is _______ . (Round off to the Nearest Integer).
solution:
Writing the half reaction

Reduction half reaction 

MnO4-→Mn2+

balancing oxygen 

MnO4-→Mn2++4H2O

balancing Hydrogen 

8H++MnO4-→Mn2++4H2O

balancing charge 

5e-+8H++MnO4-→Mn2++4H2O

Oxidation half 

C2O42-→CO2
Balancing carbon

C2O42-→2CO2

Balancing charge

C2O42-→2CO2+2e-

Net equation

16H++2MnO4-+5C2O42-→10CO2+2Mn2++8H2O

So c=16

If the last terms of these series are the maximum possible four digit numbers, then the number of common terms in these two series is equal to _______.
solution:
Given set=11,8,21,16,26,32,4

Given an arithmetic series and a geometric series having the first four terms from the given set. 

Then, 

Geometric series : 4,8,16,32,64,128,256,512,1024,2048,4096,8192

Arithmetic series: 11,16,21,26,31,36,...,256,....4096,...

Tn (G.P.)=4·2n-1

Tn (A.P.)=11+5n-1=5n+6

For common terms, 4·2n-1=5n+6

So, common terms are 16,256,4096 only.

Solving (1) and (2)

n=2m

l=8 m

[Given : sin35°=0.573,cos35°=0.819, sin110°=0.939,cos110°=-0.342]
solution:
Component along AC

=100cos35° N

=100×0.819 N

=81.9 N

≈82 N
